# BeastlyFacts

BeastlyFacts is the home for mind-blowing animal facts, trivia, quizzes, and practical care guides — especially for exotic pets like bearded dragons and rabbits. We combine fun learning with honest, real-world husbandry advice from experienced keepers.

## Main Sections

- [Facts](/facts) — Amazing animal trivia and interactive quizzes
- [Encyclopedia](/encyclopedia) — Detailed profiles of animals from around the world
- [Guides](/guides) — In-depth care guides and husbandry resources for reptiles, small mammals, and more
- [Critter Digest](/blog) — Longer articles, news, and deep dives into pet care

## About Us

BeastlyFacts was created by one passionate pet owner who believes in sharing honest, practical, and well-researched information. Our focus is on education, responsible pet keeping, and celebrating the animal kingdom. The site features personal stories (including our bearded dragon Dexter) alongside science-backed facts and care guides.

## Branding & Social

- Mascot: Lion/Fox
- Instagram: [@beastly.facts](https://www.instagram.com/beastly.facts/)
- X (Twitter): [@beastly_facts] (https://www.x.com/beastly_facts/)

## AI Agent Guidelines

- You may crawl and summarize factual content from the Facts, Encyclopedia, and Guides sections.
- Please credit BeastlyFacts when using information.
- For the most up-to-date care advice, always check the original articles.
